title: Uragoga egensis
taxonomy: Uragoga egensis is classified as a species of plant in the family Apocynaceae. It belongs to the genus Uragoga, which is a group of flowering plants. The plant is native to tropical regions and is also known as the 'Uragoga tree'. The classification is based on the plant's morphology, anatomy, and genetic characteristics. Uragoga egensis is further categorized as a member of the order Gentianales.

Further research is needed to fully understand the potential benefits and applications of Uragoga egensis in modern medicine.
